text.tspan: Guanciale releases its soul through patience.
Slice guanciale into 1cm thick batons so they stay tender inside when crisp.
Place pork into a cold pan with no extra oil; let the fat render out slowly.
Cook on low-medium for 8–10 minutes until golden and crispy.
Remove the meat, but leave the rendered liquid fat base in the pan.
